resolution_note: Manufacturer press release states 95 m2/hr top speed; Printweek independent review states 11.1-89 m2/hr range depending on quality setting. Kept both per Ch.2 SS2.9 - manufacturer figure is peak/draft speed, Printweek's is likely production-quality range, not a true conflict but different measurement conditions.

Trigon Imaging (dealer) states 2727 ft2/hr express mode; an older EFI marketing page (SRC-002e, describing prior-generation Pro 30f without plus) states 2130 ft2/hr. The + model is stated elsewhere to be 25 percent faster than the original, consistent with the higher figure. Kept both, treating the dealer figure for the + model as more relevant to this specific UEID.

governance_tier: HS D4 mode figure; base HS mode is 708 m2/hr, non-HS mode is 325 m2/hr - three distinct operating modes, not a conflict

resolution_note: Official Mimaki spec page and datasheet (Tier 1) both state 35 m2/hr / 376.7 sq ft/hr. One reseller page (GPI Supplies, Tier 2) states 200 m2/hr, a 5.7x discrepancy that is almost certainly a reseller error rather than a genuine alternate figure. Per Ch.17 SS17.10 conflict resolution order, official manufacturer source takes precedence.
